purpose: Rank open gaps, latent paths, forgotten items, and claim blockers so TOKEN_VAZIO becomes an auditable discovery queue rather than an accidental omission.
axiom: Ruido entendido vira sinal. Erro medido vira engenharia. Lacuna marcada vira ciencia. TOKEN_VAZIO protegido vira verdade futura.

priority_scale.P0: blocks scientific credibility or claim boundary
priority_scale.P1: highest value next measurement or schema/test gate

items.what_exists: external_only_seed catalogs, CI artifacts, JSON reports, mapped ledgers
items.what_is_missing: local raw data files with sha256, source version, license/terms, access date, and reproducible download method
items.risk_if_ignored: seed-level references may be mistaken for full validation data
items.next_measure: create raw_data_manifest.yml and ingest one raw dataset first

items.what_exists: RLL comparison docs and earlier real-data ledgers
items.what_is_missing: covariance-aware joint comparison with BAO, H(z), Pantheon+, Planck/CMB, f_sigma8 against LCDM, wCDM, and CPL
items.risk_if_ignored: core RLL claim remains weaker than the wider validation scaffold
items.next_measure: rebuild model_comparison.json with robust covariance and CPL baseline

items.what_exists: claim_allowed=false is preserved in seed artifacts
items.what_is_missing: automated CI gate that fails if claim_allowed becomes true without raw data, checksum, metric, baseline, uncertainty, and reviewer note

items.what_exists: GW230529 and GW190814 seed records plus v0 mass-gap calculations
items.what_is_missing: LVK/GWOSC posterior samples, posterior overlap probability, EOS and low-mass BH baseline comparison
items.risk_if_ignored: mass-gap route remains descriptive rather than quantitative
items.next_measure: ingest one posterior sample table and compute mass_gap_overlap_probability

items.what_exists: Earth, Moon, Mars, Jupiter reference seed metrics and CI artifact
items.what_is_missing: SPICE/JPL Horizons state vectors, gravity harmonics, shape model versions, rotation model, covariance, Kepler/Newton/N-body/J2 baseline
items.risk_if_ignored: orbital route remains a reference-constant calculation, not dynamical validation
items.next_measure: ingest one SPICE/JPL state-vector table and compare h from vectors vs seed formula
items.claim_boundary: no orbital deformation or new gravity claim

items.what_is_missing: formal JSON schemas for ingestion plan, validation result, orbital metric result, and claim boundary
items.risk_if_ignored: artifacts remain readable but not contract-validated
items.next_measure: add data/schemas/*.schema.json and CI schema validation

items.what_is_missing: tests for parser signs, claim boundary, ingestion routing, and orbital formulas
items.risk_if_ignored: known parser class of bugs can return
items.claim_boundary: CI should fail on parser regression

items.what_exists: mapped seed and route in orchestration
items.what_is_missing: object-level stream membership data, validator script, JSON artifact, stream-membership metric
items.next_measure: add validate_residual_gravity_structures.py and seed result JSON

items.what_is_missing: Gaia astrometry/RV table, Galactic potential model, traceback probability code
items.next_measure: ingest one HVS table and compute origin traceback probability
items.claim_boundary: no origin claim without model comparison

items.what_is_missing: raw JWST/Chandra tables, mass uncertainty model, host-galaxy constraints, magnification and selection checks
items.risk_if_ignored: growth route remains simplified Eddington arithmetic
items.next_measure: add high_z source manifest with raw tables and baseline seed models

items.what_is_missing: hot-Jupiter or close-in exoplanet seed catalog
items.next_measure: add optional exoplanet_tidal_deformation route only after core orbital route matures

items.what_exists: residual structure route and Gaia BH3 seed
items.what_is_missing: stream-as-field-line interpretation and baseline Milky Way potential comparison
items.risk_if_ignored: strong transdisciplinary bridge is left unformalized

safe_conclusion: The open items are not failures. They are ranked measurement and governance tasks. Until P0/P1 blockers are closed, all scientific claims remain blocked.
